# comment block with the actual pipeline coverage report.

#   Buckets detected: articles (2 files), books (1), transcripts (1),

#   Files skipped total: 0
#
#   Candidates merged:   3-5 cognitive_patterns, 2-3 questions, 1-2 tensions
#   Candidates verified (3/3): 3 (frame-surfacing, falsification-test,
#                               exit-walk)
